eval.prompt: Open the recorder, identify the newest completed session, and report its duration and monitor.
eval.expects: Calls open_recorder, list_recording_sessions; cites a real session ID.

eval.prompt: Find the first click in the newest session and return the nearest frame as evidence.
eval.expects: Lists sessions, queries timeline, calls get_frame_at.

eval.prompt: Find a type_text request and explain what is public versus encrypted without exposing text.
eval.expects: Uses timeline; explains redaction and encrypted payload.

eval.prompt: Show whether a requested scroll has nearby injected OS input in the latest session.
Return the frame currently selected in the desktop reviewer.
eval.expects: Calls get_selected_frame and reports session and offset.

eval.prompt: Find a transient menu interaction and return frames immediately before and after it.
eval.expects: Uses timeline and at least two get_frame_at calls.

eval.prompt: Compare requested click timing with the nearest captured frame and state confidence.
Paginate through a session timeline until you find the first wheel event.
Check recorder state and tell me whether submitting a prompt now will record.
Collect visual evidence for the last three distinct requested actions in a completed session.
eval.expects: Lists, timelines, and retrieves three real frames.
